reviews.name: Jerry Edmonds
reviews.text: Rob, David, and the crew did a great job on our roof. They were prompt and courteous, and completed the job in one day with thorough cleanup.

reviews.name: David Saren
reviews.text: Rob and his team have done several roof repairs for me over the years and each time quickly and accurately diagnosed the issue. Professional from start to finish.

reviews.name: Marya Morrison
reviews.text: Rob has done excellent work at many of my investment properties and personal home — he's my go-to roofer for Tampa Bay roof repair and replacement.

reviews.name: Tim Bradshaw
reviews.text: These guys are terrific. They were punctual, thorough, and economical. They cleaned up their mess and use the same crew every job.

reviews.name: Mary Paxton
reviews.text: Roof Monsters is a fabulous roofing company — had my roof done yesterday. Very polite, very reasonable, fast working. I would definitely recommend.

reviews.name: Sharon Herman
reviews.text: Rob came out on time and replaced our missing shingles. He's friendly, professional and a pleasure to chat with.

reviews.name: William Smith
reviews.text: Rob came out to the house the next day after calling. We discussed the issues we were having, he found the leak and fixed it promptly.

reviews.name: Diana Andonian
reviews.text: Rob came out the same day as my call. He found my issue immediately. Even though it wasn't a roof issue, he helped point us in the right direction.

reviews.name: John Weston
reviews.text: I have done business with Terrance McKeever Roofing for years. Excellent work with fair prices — I've referred them to family and friends for over 30 years.

reviews.name: Jackie Capo
reviews.text: What an amazing job — finished in no time. Friendly and courteous crew. Made sure everything was cleaned up afterwards.
